name: bedrock-vscode-chat
displayName: AWS Bedrock Provider for GitHub Copilot Chat
description: Native AWS Bedrock integration for GitHub Copilot Chat. Brings Claude, Amazon Nova, Llama, Mistral and more into your editor with streaming, function calling, and vision support across AWS regions.

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.region.description: AWS region for Bedrock services (e.g., us-east-1, eu-west-1)
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.region.title: AWS Region

enumDescriptions: Use an AWS Bedrock API Key (Bearer Token)
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.authMe.title: Authentication Method

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.apiKey.description: AWS Bedrock API Key (Bearer Token) - starts with 'bedrock-api-key-'. Can be long-term (1-365 days) or short-term (up to 12 hours). Only used when authMethod is 'api-key'.
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.apiKey.title: Bedrock API Key

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.profil.description: AWS profile name from ~/.aws/credentials (only used when authMethod is 'profile')
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.profil.title: AWS Profile

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.access.description: AWS Access Key ID (only used when authMethod is 'access-keys')
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.access.title: Access Key ID

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.secret.description: AWS Secret Access Key (only used when authMethod is 'access-keys')
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.secret.title: Secret Access Key

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.sessio.description: AWS Session Token for temporary credentials (optional)
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.sessio.title: Session Token

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.infere.description: Map of model IDs to inference profile ARNs or IDs. Use this to route specific models through application inference profiles. Example: { "anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6": "arn:aws:bedrock:ap-southeast-2:123456789012:application-inference-profile/abc123" }
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.infere.title: Inference Profile Overrides

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.manual.title: Manual Models
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.manual.markdownDescription: Manually declared Bedrock models. Use this when the environment blocks `bedrock:ListFoundationModels` / `bedrock:ListInferenceProfiles` (e.g. a restrictive Service Control Policy) but still allows Converse/InvokeModel, or to pin an explicit set of models. If auto-discovery fails and this list is non-empty, the extension falls back to these models instead of erroring; otherwise entries are merged with discovered models.

name.description: Display name shown in the model picker. Defaults to the id.

inferenceProfile.description: Inference profile ID or ARN to invoke instead of the bare id (e.g. "global.anthropic.claude-opus-4-8"). Most cross-region models require this.

vision.description: Whether the model accepts image input.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run clean && npm run compile
